title: Repay the archive growth budget from the latest default branch

sources.reason: The merged archive repair will raise immutable archiveGrowth beyond the current 480 ceiling.
CI rejected the unmerged repair branch because its two Work Items violated PR ownership; this clean Work Item starts from origin/main.

rawUserRequest: 从最新默认分支建立单一预算偿还工单，修复发布归档后 archiveGrowth 预算，按完整 Work Item、PR、合并、ai-close-work-item 和默认分支同步流程完成。

declaredIntent.summary: Reserve bounded archive budget from the latest default branch for the already-authorized release repair sequence.

riskAssessment.reason: Initial skeleton; replace with task-specific implementation and review risks.

executionDecision.reason: The bounded budget correction is authorized and has a concrete CI/repository evidence source.

preReviewWarnings: Confirm one Work Item is represented in the PR and no prior unmerged Work Item is included.

checkpointPolicy.reason: Record at least one checkpoint before finishing to reduce mid-task drift.

acceptance: archiveGrowth maximum is raised to cover the projected post-archive count with an explicit repayment record.
The PR contains exactly one newly maintained Work Item.
Governance complexity and required AI checks pass before archive.
guidelines: Preserve immutable Work Item lifecycle evidence.
Keep archive budget repayment explicit and bounded.

intent.problem: The prior budget PR was incorrectly based on an unmerged repair PR and therefore contained two Work Items; a clean budget reservation must start from origin/main.
constraints: Change only the governance budget and this Work Item evidence.
Do not delete or rewrite existing archive records.
intent.rationale: A clean base is required by repository governance and makes the PR ownership check independently verifiable.

restrictedWriteApproval.reason: User explicitly authorized the current plan implementation and required governance budget repair.

rollbackNote: Revert this Work Item diff and restore related tests and docs.
